generations.content_context: Solana's price decline and a broader crypto market downturn have inhibited token performance across the ecosystem.
generations.scene_or_viz_prompt: Three main holographic panels: “Solana Price,” “Market Trend,” and “Token Performance.” Solana Price shows a real-time numeric gauge with a downward red arrow. Market Trend panel displays a line graph tracking overall crypto market movement, accentuated in cyan. Token Performance features segmented bars representing ecosystem tokens, colored magenta for decline, orange for stability. Thin, glowing cyan lines connect Solana Price to both Market Trend and Token Performance, illustrating influence. Floating data chips with animated numeric deltas hover beside each panel. All elements have a luminous, glassy translucence with cyan, magenta, and orange UI highlights.
generations.full_prompt:
Create a professional data visualization for a tech news publication.

VISUALIZATION TYPE: Three main holographic panels: “Solana Price,” “Market Trend,” and “Token Performance.” Solana Price shows a real-time numeric gauge with a downward red arrow. Market Trend panel displays a line graph tracking overall crypto market movement, accentuated in cyan. Token Performance features segmented bars representing ecosystem tokens, colored magenta for decline, orange for stability. Thin, glowing cyan lines connect Solana Price to both Market Trend and Token Performance, illustrating influence. Floating data chips with animated numeric deltas hover beside each panel. All elements have a luminous, glassy translucence with cyan, magenta, and orange UI highlights.

CONTENT CONTEXT:
Solana's price decline and a broader crypto market downturn have inhibited token performance across the ecosystem.

STYLE: Holographic heads-up display with neon metrics, glitch effects, and futuristic UI elements. Sci-fi interface aesthetic.

REQUIREMENTS:
- Professional infographic/dashboard quality
- Clean, polished vector aesthetic
- Include section headers and labels where appropriate
- Strategic use of color to highlight key insights
- Editorial publication quality
- Modern, sophisticated design, cyberpunk HUD, holographic interface, neon glow, futuristic, sci-fi
